title: BEM-841 remove queue verify
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/removed']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:02 (UTC+3)'
removed=[]
for folder in ['governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid']:
    path=Path(folder)
    if path.exists():
        archive=Path('governance/removed')/(path.name+'_removed_bem841')
        archive.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
        for p in sorted(path.glob('*')):
            if p.is_file():
                target=archive/p.name
                target.write_text(p.read_text(errors='ignore'))
                p.unlink()
                removed.append(str(p))
for p in [Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh'),Path('scripts/commit_workflow_dispatch_results.sh')]:
    if p.exists():
        archive=Path('governance/removed')/(p.name+'.removed_bem841')
        archive.write_text(p.read_text(errors='ignore'))
        p.unlink()
        removed.append(str(p))
runner=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
refs=[]
if runner.exists():
    lines=runner.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines()
    new=[]; i=0
    while i < len(lines):
        line=lines[i]
        if 'workflow dispatch queue' in line.lower() or 'workflow_dispatch_queue' in line or 'process_workflow_dispatch_queue' in line or 'commit_workflow_dispatch_results' in line:
            refs.append({'line':i+1,'text':line.strip()})
            i+=1
            while i < len(lines) and (lines[i].startswith('        ') or lines[i].startswith('          ') or lines[i].strip()=='' or lines[i].strip().startswith('env:') or lines[i].strip().startswith('run:') or lines[i].strip().startswith('if:')):
                i+=1
            continue
        new.append(line)
        i+=1
    runner.write_text('\n'.join(new)+sep)
# Scan remaining active refs.
active_refs=[]
for p in [runner,Path('.github/workflows/claude-dispatch-bridge.yml')]:
    if p.exists():
        text=p.read_text(errors='ignore')
        if 'workflow_dispatch_queue' in text or 'process_workflow_dispatch_queue' in text or 'commit_workflow_dispatch_results' in text:
            active_refs.append(str(p))
status='queue_removed_verified' if not active_refs else 'queue_refs_remain'
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':status,'removed':removed,'removed_runner_refs':refs,'active_refs':active_refs,'next_action':'implement direct dispatch path without JSON queue' if status=='queue_removed_verified' else 'remove remaining queue refs','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem841_idempotent_remove_queue_verify.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_idempotent_remove_queue_verify.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Idempotent Remove Queue Verify | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Next: '+state['next_action']+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+state['next_action']+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem841_idempotent_remove_queue_verify.json','governance/reports/bem841_idempotent_remove_queue_verify.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl',str(runner)])
ops_applied.append('Idempotently removed workflow dispatch queue files/scripts and verified active queue references are absent')
"""
No issue comments.
